findings.title: Acceptance-criteria verification is underspecified
findings.detail: Phase 6 only has generic workflow test. Need explicit tasks for SC verification.
findings.suggested_resolution: Add specific verification tasks for each SC in Phase 6.

findings.title: Target inventory and validation steps do not line up across plan and tasks
findings.detail: JSON validation pointed at wrong tree — openspec/changes/ ledgers not covered.
findings.suggested_resolution: Extend JSON lint to cover openspec/changes/ as well.

findings.title: SC-001 final grep omits tracked backup ledger artifacts
findings.detail: T042 limits grep to *.md, *.json, *.sh but .json.bak files with speckit references exist.
findings.suggested_resolution: Remove --include filters to grep all tracked files.
